message:
Add Series dt accessor conformance coverage

Adds harness support and 7 new fixtures for datetime accessor methods:
- series_dt_year (FP-P2D-179)
- series_dt_month (FP-P2D-180)
- series_dt_day (FP-P2D-181)
- series_dt_hour (FP-P2D-182)
- series_dt_minute (FP-P2D-183)
- series_dt_second (FP-P2D-184)
- series_dt_dayofweek (FP-P2D-185)

Coverage: 857 fixtures total, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
